text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho—the Classic Triple Crown race
said to be won only by the strongest
Umamusume—is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I endorse her skills before trying to send her off
to the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she responds that the strength of our
bond is more important than her skill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intent on proving this, she heads to the
racecourse with an invigorated look, as if freed
from the shackles that once held her back.
